rootLoader.title: Load identity
rootLoader.copy: Paste an npub, nprofile, NIP-05, hex key, or profile link. Sigma will query relays and project the neighborhood.

rootInput.label: Nostr identity
rootInput.placeholder: npub, nprofile, NIP-05, hex, or profile link
rootInput.empty: Paste an npub, nprofile, NIP-05, hex key, or profile link.

topBar.placeholderReady: Search for a person in the graph

status.matches: {count, plural, one {# visible match.} other {# visible matches.}}

topBar.searchAria: Search for a person in the graph
topBar.hint: Matches by fragment, regardless of case or accents.

savedRoots.empty: There are no saved identities yet.

emptyState.title: Explore any Nostr identity.
emptyState.copy: Load an npub or nprofile. Sigma queries your relays, discovers relationships, and projects the neighborhood as a live graph.

settings.showInGraphDesc: Controls whether zap connections and animations are drawn over the scene.
settings.pauseLargeScenes: Pause live feed in large scenes
settings.pauseLargeScenesDesc: Limits relay filters when more than {limit} nodes are visible.
settings.enableLargeSceneLimit: Enable live zap pause in large scenes

panel.keepWorking: It keeps working even if you close this panel.
panel.empty: There are no visible zaps in this session yet.

all.label: Whole graph
all.hint: Base view: root, outgoing follows, incoming followers, and expanded nodes.

following.label: Who I follow
following.hint: Who I follow: outgoing follows from the root and from expanded nodes.

followers.label: Follows me
followers.hint: Follows me: incoming follows to the root and expanded nodes.

oneway.label: One-way
oneway.hint: One-way: confirmed relationship from only one side.

connections.label: Connections
connections.caption: mutuals
connections.hint: Connections: only mutuals from the root and expanded nodes.

filtersPanel.title: Connection filter
filtersPanel.description: Choose which relationships you want to see in the graph. This changes the visible projection, not the loaded data or the exportable evidence.

relayEditor.title: Session relays
relayEditor.applyError: The relays could not be applied.
relayEditor.reverted: The custom relay configuration was reverted.
relayEditor.revertError: The relay configuration could not be reverted.

graphCapacity.title: Graph size
graphCapacity.description: Increase it to allow more connections in. Lower it if you want less layout, memory, and avatar load.
graphCapacity.capReached: The graph hit the current cap. If you want to keep expanding, raise this limit and try again.

visuals.rootSizeDesc: Adjusts the root node base size in the graph.
visuals.expandedSizeDesc: Adjusts the base size of nodes with expanded connections.
visuals.visibleDegreeDesc: Each node shows how many visible edges touch it in the current view.
visuals.showVisibleEdges: Show visible edge count per node
visuals.monogramLettersDesc: Shows initials when there is no photo available.

performance.findMoreNodesDesc: Queries relays and cache again looking for new followers of the root.
performance.prioritizeFluidityDesc: Reduce visible connections when performance drops. Status: {status}.
performance.mobileDegradedDesc: Reduces limits to optimize performance on phones.
performance.runtimeInspectorDescLocked: Shows the button to open runtime snapshots. In development it stays visible by default.
performance.runtimeInspectorDescUnlocked: Shows the button to open runtime snapshots. In production it stays hidden until you enable it.
performance.browserCacheDesc: Clears persisted data for this page and reloads the explorer.{message}
performance.avatarPhotosDesc: Real photos cost more network, decode, and draw work.
performance.hideOnMoveDesc: Switches to monograms during pan, drag, or fast node movement.
performance.hideWhenZoomedOutDesc: Switches to monograms when nodes look very small on screen.

relays.customDesc: This session is using a custom list.
relays.baseDesc: This session is using the explorer base configuration.

detail.loadingProfileBio: Loading profile from relays and cache...
detail.identityHelp: You opened an identity. Explore its connections or pin it to compare it.
